label: NCO
tooltip: Non-crossover / gene-conversion events from ngsTracts (NCO, MOSAIC_SHORT, MOSAIC_LONG). Inside-vs-outside-inversion enrichment is the primary signal.
doc: Gene-conversion tracts from ngsTracts: classes NCO (short, anywhere), MOSAIC_SHORT (50–200 kb inside inversions — primary signal), MOSAIC_LONG (suspicious long-span with matching flanks). Views: per-dyad counts, tract-length distribution, per-chromosome rate, inside-vs-outside-inversion enrichment.
status_note: Product registered 2026-05-20. Real-data run pending Stage 3 outputs on the 226-sample hatchery cohort.

label: crossovers
tooltip: Meiosis events that are NOT NCO: single and double crossovers (CO + DCO). Per-dyad counts, refined breakpoints (STEP_TRC_02), karyotype-stratified rate.
doc: Single and double crossovers per dyad and chromosome. Views: per-dyad raw count, rate per Mb, refined breakpoint positions (STEP_TRC_02 traversal_breakpoints.tsv), karyotype-stratified rate to test intrachromosomal inversion-on-meiosis effects.
status_note: chromosome_meiosis_events.v1 has partial coverage (14/29 chroms per registry); inversion_meiosis_effects.v1 has no builder yet.

label: interchromosomal
tooltip: HEADLINE: does a focal inversion's karyotype on chrom X alter meiosis on OTHER chromosomes? Folds coincidence matrix, local controls, family-aware permutation, and interchromosomal effect estimates.
doc: For each focal inversion, test whether heterozygous parents show altered CO rate, DCO rate, or coefficient of coincidence (C) on chromosomes other than the inversion's own. Family-aware permutation null + local-inversion covariates. The atlas's manuscript-grade headline.
status_note: Three of four products have no builder yet (coincidence_matrix, local_inv_controls, family_aware_permutation_design — all 'missing' per registry).

label: crossovers (per candidate)
tooltip: Per-inversion-candidate CO view: sex-specific ideogram (red♀/blue♂), CO-rate vs. relative telomere distance with 95% CI band, optional PRDM9 sequence logo. Keyed by shared.candidate. Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page11.
doc: Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page11. Three views over the recombination map around one inversion candidate at a time: sex-specific CO ideogram (red♀ / blue♂), CO rate vs. relative telomere distance (LOESS + 95% CI band per sex), optional PRDM9 sequence logo (auto-hidden when prdm9_motif.pwm absent). Keyed by shared.candidate; renderer fetches data/crossovers/<candidate_id>.json. Cohort-level CO/DCO view lives on the sibling `crossovers` page.

label: NCO / GC (per candidate)
tooltip: Sister page to crossovers_per_candidate, same per-inversion-candidate keying. Green NCO + yellow gene-conversion tract ideogram and tract-rate vs. relative telomere distance curves. Driven by nco_gc_track. Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page12.
doc: Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page12. Sister to crossovers_per_candidate, same candidate keying. Two views: tract ideogram (green NCO ticks left, yellow GC ticks right, candidate span as translucent band) and tract rate vs. relative telomere distance (LOESS curve + 95% CI band per kind). Keyed by shared.candidate; renderer fetches data/nco_gc/<candidate_id>.json. Cohort-level NCO view lives on the sibling `nco` page.

label: observables
tooltip: Meiotic crossover observables. Single CO (r1, r2), double CO (r12), coefficient of coincidence C, interference I = 1 - C. Documents the d / x identifiability limitation: from offspring genotype data alone the precondition probability d and exchange probability x are not separable.

label: eligibility (p map)
tooltip: Eligibility (p map) — per-window NCO/Mb across one chromosome. NCO traces the precondition / DSB substrate layer; high NCO = plentiful substrate, low NCO = ancient cold region. Inversion footprints overlaid. Karyotype matrix surfaced below.

label: resolution (x map)
tooltip: Resolution (x map) — per-window CO/(NCO+CO) share. Closest visible proxy for the latent exchange probability x. Inside an active heterokaryotypic inversion: resolution drops sharply while NCO is preserved (Eligibility page).

label: coincidence (C map)
tooltip: Coincidence — 2D per-window-pair heatmap of C = r12 / (r1*r2) for one chromosome (Sandler interference map). C ~ 1 = independence; C < 1 = positive interference (the normal pattern); C >> 1 = negative interference (usually artefact). Click any cell to inspect the pair.

label: inversion signature
tooltip: Inversion signature — three stacked tracks for one chromosome (NCO/Mb, CO/meiosis, resolution) plus per-candidate verdict cards. Cross-layer rule: NCO ~ flank + CO suppressed = consistent with active inversion; CO not suppressed = reject; both low = ancient cold region; NCO elevated = ambiguous.

label: inv x meiosis scan
tooltip: Focal inversion x meiosis coincidence scan. For each focal inversion, compares the coefficient of coincidence on every tested chromosome between carriers and matched non-carriers, using a family-aware permutation null. Per-row intra/inter relation tag + status pill (strong / moderate / weak / no effect / FAMILY CONFOUNDED).

label: workflows
tooltip: Visible inventory of every meiosis bloc the atlas forwards to atlas-core's master Workflow Catalogue. One row per registered analysis (atomic stat / CHAIN / per-candidate track) with module-backed status badge. Source: catalogue_outbound/*.jsonl, auto-generated by generate_catalogue_outbound.py.
doc: User-facing view of catalogue_outbound/*.jsonl. Joins module_registry + analysis_registry + analysis_modes + layer_registry so each bloc shows its module, biomod_status, produced layer, required dimensions, and a computed status badge (ready / stale / contract-only). Validates the three atlas-core hard constraints in-page (constraint violations are highlighted in the banner + logged to console). No envelope dependency; reads static repo files via the atlas-core static-file route.
status_note: Source files are auto-generated by atlases/meiosis/registries/generate_catalogue_outbound.py from data/actions.registry.json + catalogue_outbound_config.json. Re-running the generator updates this page automatically.
